title: RTP random
description: This is the most lightweight RTP plugin
body:
RTP Random — Lightweight & Easy Random Teleport

RTP Random lets your players teleport to random spots in the world instantly with just one simple command! No complicated setup, no lag — just pure exploration fun.

Features:

One-command random teleport: Players get whisked away to a random location by typing a single command.

Super easy to configure: Customize world borders, safe zones, and more in a clean, simple config file.

Lightweight and efficient: Minimal server impact, perfect for all server sizes.

Multi-world support: Different settings per world to fit your server’s needs.

Safe teleportation: Avoids blocks and hazardous spots to keep players safe.

Perfect for survival, factions, and adventure servers wanting quick, safe random teleports without fuss. Let your players explore with RTP Random!
